examples: Elizabeth Ann Buttle had two kids, Belinda and Joseph, which is nothing special in itself.
The study, for the charity Buttle UK, says kinship carers need more support.
Buttle UK called on the government actively to monitor and report on local authorities that were not following the statutory guidance.
The report is the second of a two-part study into kinship care carried out by Buttle UK and the University of Bristol.
